reviews.name: Tan Eehan
reviews.text:
Got to know Scrubby from one of Overkill’s video. Decided to try out their service for move in cleaning.

The team deployed 4 helpers and cleaned the 4 room hdb for close to 5 hours. Cleaning quality was excellent and thorough! All the stubborn stains came off after their cleaning. The helpers pay close attention to hidden corners and grills. One of the key differentiator was the engagement manager who was onsite to walk through the cleaning areas and focus ateas to align expectations. He was also there to do debrief after the cleaning was done. Such customer service is greatly appreciated and welcomed.

Highly recommended!!!

reviews.name: L
reviews.text: During renovations, we all wish to meet with professionals that truly deliver - Junwei is one of them. He was patient with all my queries and was very thorough in the formaldehyde removal as well as air purification treatment that he performed for my new unit. I wish more vendors would be as professional as him - thank you Junwei for all you do!

reviews.name: Amanda Allais
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with this cleaning company.
The team did a very good job, everything was cleaned well.
They were also friendly, approachable, and easy to communicate with, which made the whole process smooth and pleasant.

I truly appreciate their professionalism. I will definitely engage their services again in the future.

reviews.name: emily lml
reviews.text: Engaged Scrubbys to clean my 4-room flat and got the formaldehyde removal as well. The team was punctual, detailed and professional throughout the process. The house felt noticeably cleaner and fresher after — even the chemical smell from the carpentry was completely gone. Highly recommended for anyone moving into a new place👍🏻
